Hawari Course Portal

Select your specialized clinical preparation track to begin

About Hawari Course System

Hawari Course is a premium clinical preparation platform designed to help medical students and professionals master clinical topics, build active recall, and pass their board and college exams with ease. Select a group below to start your specialized learning track.

Infection Group

Master medical microbiology, virology, infectious diseases, pharmacology, and infection control with our premium pre-seeded question bank of 550+ questions.

Dermatology Group

Master skin pathology, clinical dermatology, diagnostic signs, and therapeutic procedures. Starts with a blank customizable bank to build your own study decks.

Welcome to Hawari Course

Our integrated system for a happy journey

Master clinical infection control, disease manifestations, and premium board exams with our comprehensive preparation engine.

560+ MCQ Bank

Practice past exam papers and college MCQs categorized by clinical topics.

Tutor & Timed Modes

Get instant rationales in Tutor mode, or build speed and confidence in Timed mode.

Active Recall

Flip interactive flashcards to review high-yield concepts using spaced repetition.

Clinical Notes

Keep track of highlights, mark complex concepts, and build your own clinical notebook.

Hawari Infection

Medical Quiz Preparation Portal

Only Gmail accounts are accepted.
